title: bromus squarrosus subsp. commutatus
intro: Bromus squarrosus subsp. commutatus, also known as meadow brome, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the genus Bromus and the family Poaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of meadow brome include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate anxiety and stress. The herbal preparations of meadow brome include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
